input.headline: You should be having more slumber parties with your friends

raw.headline: You should be having more slumber parties with your friends

winner: Why don't we throw a sleepover at the local power station? Because it seems like we should all be having more slumber parties with our transformers!

candidates.text: Why don't we throw a sleepover at the local power station? Because it seems like we should all be having more slumber parties with our transformers!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Creative twist with 'transformers' referencing both electricity and friends, concise and surprising."}

candidates.text: Why don't we have sleepovers these days? Because apparently, they changed the recipe - now it's called a "waker-up party.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.0, "reason": "Puns on 'sleepover' with 'waker-up party' are clever and specific, delivering a surprise twist while keeping the joke concise and in line with the headline's theme."}

candidates.text: Why don't we have more slumber parties with my friends these days? Because they all grew up and started having sleepovers at their own apartments!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat relatable and has a mild twist, but it's generic and lacks the surprise or specificity needed for higher humor impact."}

candidates.text: Apparently, I've been hosting these gatherings all wrong. Instead of keeping everyone awake all night, I should be encouraging sleep.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat surprising and specific, but the humor is mild and relies on a slight twist that may not fully land due to its generic setup."}

candidates.text: If you're still having slumber parties at this age, I guess the real question is... who's sleeping where now?
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat relevant and has a mild twist, but lacks the surprise and specificity needed for stronger humor."}
